title: ChatClear
description: ChatClear is the ultimate solution for keeping your server's chat clean and professional. Whether you prefer old-school color codes or modern gradients, ChatClear handles it all seamlessly.
body:
```
Supportet Versions: 1.8 - 1.21.11
```

**English:** A lightweight and modern chat management plugin supporting both Legacy (&a) and MiniMessage (<green>) formats with fully customizable messages and an easy-to-use edit system.

**German:** Ein leichtgewichtiges und modernes Chat-Management-Plugin, das sowohl Legacy (&a) als auch MiniMessage (<green>) Formate unterstützt. Mit vollständig anpassbaren Nachrichten und einfachem Editier-System.

**Description / Features**
ChatClear is the ultimate solution for keeping your server's chat clean and professional. Whether you prefer old-school color codes or modern gradients, ChatClear handles it all seamlessly.

**Key Features**
- Dual Format Support: unique compatibility layer that supports Legacy (&c) and MiniMessage (<red>) simultaneously. No more broken colors!
- In-Game Editing: Use /cc edit <message> to change the clear message instantly without touching config files.
- Smart Formatting: Automatically detects color codes and formats them correctly, even if you switch modes.
- Minimal Mode: Option to disable subcommands for a streamlined experience.
- Unicode Spam: customizable spam characters to flush the chat buffer effectively.

**Commands**
- /cc or /chatclear: Clears the global chat.
- /cc edit <text>: Changes the broadcast message in-game.
- /cc format <LEGACY/MINIMESSAGE>: Switches the color mode instantly.
- /cc reload: Reloads the configuration.
- /cc version: Displays plugin info.
- /cc reset: Resets the config to defaults.

**Permissions**
- chatclear.use: Allow clearing the chat.
- chatclear.edit: Allow editing the message.
- chatclear.format: Allow changing the format mode.
- chatclear.reload: Allow reloading.
- chatclear.reset: Allow resetting the config.
